subject: SMS delivery failure to UK numbers
body: We are seeing SMS messages fail when sending to UK (+44) numbers. Delivery receipts show status 'failed' within seconds. This started yesterday around 14:00 UTC. Our messaging profile is configured with a US long code sender.

subject: International SMS routing issue
body: Messages to Germany and France are not being delivered. We are using a US toll-free number as the sender. Recipients report never receiving the messages, but our dashboard shows them as 'sent'.

subject: Voice call audio quality degradation
body: Customers are reporting choppy audio and one-way audio on inbound voice calls through our SIP trunk. Calls connect fine but audio cuts out after 30-60 seconds. Codec is set to G.711.

subject: SIP trunk registration failures
body: Our PBX cannot register to the Telnyx SIP trunk. Getting 403 Forbidden on REGISTER. We recently rotated our SIP password. IPs are whitelisted in the IP access control list.

subject: Webhook signature verification failing
body: Our webhook handler is rejecting all Telnyx webhooks with invalid signature. We are using the Ed25519 public key from the portal. This started after we regenerated our API key last week.

subject: API key rotation broke our integration
body: After rotating our Telnyx API key, all API calls return 401 Unauthorized. We updated the key in our environment variables and restarted the service. The old key still works but the new one does not.

subject: MMS media attachment size limit
body: We are sending MMS messages with image attachments. Messages with images larger than 500KB are being rejected. What is the maximum allowed media size for MMS?

subject: Number porting delay — US numbers
body: Our port order for 50 US numbers has been in 'pending' status for 12 days. The expected port date has passed. LOA documents were uploaded and approved. Carrier is Verizon.

subject: Conference call participant limit
body: We need to host conference calls with more than 50 participants. Currently calls fail to add participants after 50 join. Is there a configurable limit on conference bridge size?

subject: Fax rendering issues on received PDFs
body: Inbound faxes are arriving as corrupted PDF files. Some pages are blank, others have vertical streaks. Outbound faxes work fine. This is happening with faxes from multiple senders.

subject: Billing dispute — overcharged for SMS segments
body: Our invoice shows 3x the expected SMS segment count for last month. We sent 10,000 messages but were billed for 30,000 segments. Messages were under 160 characters so should be 1 segment each.

subject: Call forwarding not working after hours
body: Our after-hours call forwarding rule is not triggering. Calls to our main number during off-hours should forward to an on-call cell phone, but they go straight to voicemail instead.

subject: WebRTC client connection drops
body: Our browser-based WebRTC softphone drops the connection every 2-3 minutes. The call stays active on the Telnyx side but the client shows 'reconnecting'. Using the Telnyx WebRTC JS SDK.

subject: Delivery receipts delayed by hours
body: SMS delivery receipts (DLRs) are arriving 2-4 hours after the message was actually delivered. This is breaking our delivery tracking. Recipients confirm they received the SMS immediately.

subject: Sticky sender not working across messaging profile
body: We enabled sticky sender on our messaging profile, but recipients are still seeing different sender numbers for each message from the same end-user. Number pool has 20 numbers.
